title: Simulation Runner Worker v1
determinism: Loads only declared simulation registries, topology registries, seed data, and mutation manifests.
Advances simulation only by declared clock and stage rules.
Does not write to AI-control roots.

notes: command must be one of tick_once, tick_until, run_continuous, pause, snapshot, reset, or fork_timeline.
Refs must point only to declared simulation registry surfaces in this repo.
Phase H defines the contract surface only; future runtime phases may persist checkpoint and world-state artifacts.
